overall.description: A first-person walk through a moonlit grassland at night in a video game environment. The player approaches a railway track cutting through the wilderness and discovers a dead animal lying on the gravel bed, moving closer to examine the carcass under the cloudy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland under moonlight with distant mountains

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward the distant mountain range

entered.detail: bright moon partially obscured by clouds in the night sky
dark clouds drifting across the sky around the moon
dark silhouetted mountains on the horizon
tall green grass covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide-open grassland at night, illuminated by moonlight filtering through clouds. The camera moves forward through tall grass toward distant mountains, with scattered trees visible on the horizon. The environment is empty and serene.

events.description: railway tracks and gravel bed come into view on the left side of the frame
dead animal becomes visible as a dark shape on the railway tracks ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the grassy verge parallel to the railway tracks, approaching a dark object on the rails

entered.detail: metal railway tracks running through the landscape
gravel and crushed stone bed supporting the railway tracks
wooden utility pole with wires running alongside the tracks
large dark carcass of an animal lying across the railway tracks

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions as railway tracks enter the frame from the left. The camera walks alongside the gravel bed, and a dead animal becomes visible in the distance lying across the tracks. The mountains shift to the left as the camera orients toward the railway cutting.

events.description: camera slows and stops approaching the dead animal for closer examination

agents.ego_description: approaching the dead animal and stopping to examine the carcass lying on the gravel

entered.detail: cluster of trees alongside the railway embankment

segments.scene_description: The camera moves closer to the dead animal lying on the railway gravel, revealing the carcass in detail. The surrounding trees become prominent as the sky and mountains exit the frame. The movement slows as the camera stops to examine the deceased creature on the tracks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a serene, moonlit grassland that gradually narrows its focus onto a grim discovery on a railway track. It begins by gliding through tall grass under a cloudy night sky, with distant mountains and scattered trees framing a wide, empty horizon. As the camera advances, railway tracks enter the frame from the left, shifting the perspective away from the mountains and toward a gravel bed where a dead animal lies in the distance. The scene then closes in on the carcass, with the surrounding trees becoming prominent as the open sky and mountains exit the frame. The movement finally slows to a halt, bringing the deceased creature into sharp, detailed focus against the railway stones.
